title: Survivorship-safe equity data: point-in-time vendor swap (Norgate/Sharadar) via EquityDataSource seam
source: 2026-07-03 deep project review (alpha-readiness audit); gaps previously lived only in spec prose
why: yfinance has no point-in-time index membership — only currently-listed names. Spec section 7 explicitly required this backlog item; it was never created. Long-side results on a survivor universe are inflated (~1-2pp/yr large-cap anchor) and the short side is deflated (best shorts — failures — are absent). The meta-labeler can also learn survivor-only regularities ('large drawdowns always recovered'). The point-in-time re-run is the definitive acceptance gate for anything Loop B-bound; until then all M3 claims are within-universe relative claims only.
value_rationale: Acceptance gate for promotion toward paper trading; converts caveated M3 results into trustworthy ones.
scope: Pick vendor (Norgate / Sharadar / Alpaca PIT) and implement behind the existing EquityDataSource seam
Point-in-time index membership + delisting returns handling
Re-run the M3 universe (B0003) on PIT data; compare vs survivor-universe results to measure the bias-meta interaction
recommendation: Not a blocker for the first M3 test (B0003 runs caveated); it IS the gate before Loop B / paper trading.
